events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: conductor selection & sizing, wrong insulation type for wet location. NEC 310 requires conductors in wet locations to have moisture-resistant insulation (e.g., THWN, XHHW). If wrong insulation type (e.g., THHN in wet location), it's non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high (potential insulation degradation, short, shock). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: rough-complete ~80%. Value: 0 (not asked). Confidence high.
